meeting_title: Forge Axis Solutions / Voxel Monthly Sync

safety_use_cases.label: Tune no-pedestrian zone detection to focus on real pedestrian/forklift risks
safety_use_cases.description: Resize and relocate no-ped regions so shipping prep doesn’t generate excessive alerts while still flagging pedestrians walking in forklift aisles.

evidence.quote: But Parker, I'll start by kicking things over to you just to talk about some things you wanted to raise about no-ped zone.
evidence.speaker: Kendall Keller <fake.kendall.keller@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: But if I hit the three dots and then I go to the active regions, I'm specifically looking at no-ped and this is where you're getting dinged is right here when you prep that pallet and when you prep the pallet down here.
evidence.speaker: Parker Donovan <fake.parker.donovan@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: Yeah, I would say if we move that area and kind of cut it in half.
evidence.speaker: Nell Alden <fake.nell.alden@forgeaxissolutions.com>

evidence.quote: because they really shouldn't be walking in the forklift aisle all the way to the right against that barrier.
evidence.speaker: Nell Alden <fake.nell.alden@forgeaxissolutions.com>

evidence.quote: So I will save and submit this and it'll go live this afternoon.
evidence.speaker: Kendall Keller <fake.kendall.keller@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: I just figured we get that no pedestrian fixed, and now you can start focusing on the real risk.
evidence.speaker: Parker Donovan <fake.parker.donovan@voxelai.com>

safety_use_cases.label: Reduce aisle obstacles/obstructions based on Voxel alerts
safety_use_cases.description: Use alerts to identify and remove racks/obstructions from aisleways, replicating improvements from East Prime to West Prime.

evidence.quote: we kept saying, hey, we're getting dinged for obstacles and obstructions.
evidence.speaker: Nell Alden <fake.nell.alden@forgeaxissolutions.com>

evidence.quote: We stopped putting racks there.
evidence.speaker: Nell Alden <fake.nell.alden@forgeaxissolutions.com>

evidence.quote: I'm like, yes, but now we've to do it on West Prime as well.
evidence.speaker: Nell Alden <fake.nell.alden@forgeaxissolutions.com>

safety_use_cases.label: Monitor and mitigate ergonomic risks (overreaching/improper bend)
safety_use_cases.description: Track overreaching and improper bending, identify parts/processes that cause spikes, and target interventions accordingly.

evidence.quote: So overreaching down 5-10%, improper bend 10-15%, obstruction 5-10%, safety vest 5-10%, a slight dip up in parking duration, though that's nothing that would concern me.
evidence.speaker: Kendall Keller <fake.kendall.keller@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: It's all more of a constant effort, especially with overreaching.
evidence.speaker: Nell Alden <fake.nell.alden@forgeaxissolutions.com>

evidence.quote: But if we just jump up and use this one part for a few days, and that's all of our overreaching incidents, we're like, oh, crap.
evidence.speaker: Nell Alden <fake.nell.alden@forgeaxissolutions.com>

evidence.quote: And so we have used that quite a bit.
evidence.speaker: Nell Alden <fake.nell.alden@forgeaxissolutions.com>

safety_use_cases.label: Encourage pop-up conveyor use at 497 unload to reduce manual handling
safety_use_cases.description: Promote the installed pop-up conveyor at the 497 unload area to cut overreaching/manual handling despite worker resistance to changing long-standing habits.

evidence.quote: But the 497 unload, we're still trying to get them to use the pop-up conveyor that we installed.
evidence.speaker: Nell Alden <fake.nell.alden@forgeaxissolutions.com>

evidence.quote: But they're like, well, I haven't, I've done this for several years this way. Why would I change it?
evidence.speaker: Nell Alden <fake.nell.alden@forgeaxissolutions.com>

safety_use_cases.label: Monitor safety vest PPE compliance and manage seasonal impacts
safety_use_cases.description: Track safety vest usage and prepare for potential compliance/detection issues as temperatures drop and jackets are worn.

evidence.quote: safety vest 5-10%
evidence.speaker: Kendall Keller <fake.kendall.keller@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: Safety vests, I mean, that's just, I'm hoping it stays on a downward trend, but I just sent something out today because the temperatures are actually dropping.
evidence.speaker: Nell Alden <fake.nell.alden@forgeaxissolutions.com>

evidence.quote: So it'll be interesting to see if people start to wear jackets again and do all that stuff.
evidence.speaker: Nell Alden <fake.nell.alden@forgeaxissolutions.com>

evidence.quote: So I'm hoping it stays pretty neutral, but I'm scared that one might spike going a little bit forward.
evidence.speaker: Nell Alden <fake.nell.alden@forgeaxissolutions.com>

safety_use_cases.label: Plan for new thin hi-viz PPE and adjust detection accordingly
safety_use_cases.description: Evaluate moving to a PPE garment with a thin hi-viz stripe that may not be reliably detected and coordinate disabling or retraining detection as needed.

evidence.quote: I think Pat was involved about a possible new PPE garment with kind of a thinner stripe of HiViz.
evidence.speaker: Nell Alden <fake.nell.alden@forgeaxissolutions.com>

evidence.quote: And so if we did end up going to that, we would probably remove HiViz off of some of it because I don't believe Voxel can fully capture it.
evidence.speaker: Nell Alden <fake.nell.alden@forgeaxissolutions.com>

evidence.quote: And mean, it is maybe like a three inch stripe, so that wouldn't, it's not anything on you guys.
evidence.speaker: Nell Alden <fake.nell.alden@forgeaxissolutions.com>

evidence.quote: I could always see also with our perception team if there is a possibility of like training the AI to maybe pick up that small of a surface.
evidence.speaker: Kendall Keller <fake.kendall.keller@voxelai.com>

safety_use_cases.label: Use Actions workflow to assign and track safety interventions
safety_use_cases.description: Leverage the Actions workflow to assign follow-ups and measure the impact of interventions via automatic markers in reports.

evidence.quote: Now, since we spoke last, that has been rolled out fully to all of our customers.
evidence.speaker: Kendall Keller <fake.kendall.keller@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: I have not been able to assign as many actions because I've been like, okay, what's the high risk today?
evidence.speaker: Nell Alden <fake.nell.alden@forgeaxissolutions.com>

evidence.quote: once you guys actually complete an action, the good part about this process is it actually automatically inserts a marker in your data in the platform.
evidence.speaker: Kendall Keller <fake.kendall.keller@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: what did I do? When did I do it? And what effect is it having?
evidence.speaker: Kendall Keller <fake.kendall.keller@voxelai.com>

nonsafety_use_cases.label: Tune no-pedestrian zone detection to reduce alert noise
nonsafety_use_cases.description: Adjust camera regions to remove noise from routine shipping prep so users can more efficiently review incidents and prioritize meaningful events.

evidence.quote: But if I hit the three dots and then I go to the active regions, I'm specifically looking at no-ped and this is where you're getting dinged is right here when you prep that pallet and when you prep the pallet down here.
evidence.speaker: Parker Donovan <fake.parker.donovan@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: Would you like to keep it? Or do you want us to remove the noise and narrow that scope?
evidence.speaker: Parker Donovan <fake.parker.donovan@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: So I will save and submit this and it'll go live this afternoon.
evidence.speaker: Kendall Keller <fake.kendall.keller@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: I just figured we get that no pedestrian fixed, and now you can start focusing on the real risk.
evidence.speaker: Parker Donovan <fake.parker.donovan@voxelai.com>

nonsafety_use_cases.label: Exclude planned events from analytics to avoid skewed metrics
nonsafety_use_cases.description: Hide or remove timeframes for fire drills or family days so unusual pedestrian traffic and PPE exceptions don’t inflate incident counts.

evidence.quote: And I will say if we do get a spike right now, which we shouldn't, but we're doing our fire drills this week.
evidence.speaker: Nell Alden <fake.nell.alden@forgeaxissolutions.com>

evidence.quote: That's something we can hide.
evidence.speaker: Kendall Keller <fake.kendall.keller@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: Like if you want to select a particular time frame, we can actually remove that information because it's not contributing to your overall efforts for safety.
evidence.speaker: Kendall Keller <fake.kendall.keller@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: It's definitely for those instances where some customers come to me and are like, hey, we have families on site today.
evidence.speaker: Kendall Keller <fake.kendall.keller@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: You know, there's not going to be safety vests.
evidence.speaker: Kendall Keller <fake.kendall.keller@voxelai.com>

nonsafety_use_cases.label: Use Actions workflow to manage corrective actions and track impact
nonsafety_use_cases.description: Adopt the Actions workflow to assign actions and visualize their impact via report markers that show changes in incident trends.

evidence.quote: Now, since we spoke last, that has been rolled out fully to all of our customers.
evidence.speaker: Kendall Keller <fake.kendall.keller@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: I have not been able to assign as many actions because I've been like, okay, what's the high risk today?
evidence.speaker: Nell Alden <fake.nell.alden@forgeaxissolutions.com>

evidence.quote: once you guys actually complete an action, the good part about this process is it actually automatically inserts a marker in your data in the platform.
evidence.speaker: Kendall Keller <fake.kendall.keller@voxelai.com>

evidence.quote: So are we trending down? Are we staying the same? Are we going up?
evidence.speaker: Kendall Keller <fake.kendall.keller@voxelai.com>
